MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Mitch Lyon
Atty. Michael C. Hall, Esq. for for Plaintiff: .
Plaintiff's Witness: Peter Sherburn-Zimmer, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: MATTHEW HOOKER .
EXH.1 - 3 DAY-NOTICE TO QUIT -------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff PETER SHERBURN-ZIMMER and against the Defendant MATTHEW HOOKER as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at
2757 POLK STREET #3, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
PRINCIPAL - $1,894.00 (BACK RENT)
COST -(PER MEMORANDUM OF COSTS)
TOTAL JUDGMENT - $1,894.00
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in court.

Off Calendar Jan-02-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Matthew Hooker, 200-9307, defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona
Francisco A. Gutierrez of the Law Offices of Michael C. Hall, 512-9865, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
